category_sources: source_facts.description says FUSE filesystem to mount squashfs archives; official GitHub About text repeats FUSE filesystem to mount squashfs archives.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is squashfuse; official GitHub repository and README use squashfuse.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and contains build/use information for the FUSE SquashFS mounter.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/vasi/squashfuse; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies FUSE and SquashFS archive mounting; official GitHub About text confirms the same purpose.
